note: Weights recalibrated 2026-07-22 from Noah's first filled calibration sheet (Rainier and RMNP reactions only; Maroon Bells excluded pending the Maroon Zone anchor fix). His comfortable day of 9 mi / 2200 ft was validated by the reactions and kept. Prior still hand-set; recalibrate after 20+ personal ratings exist in parks/ratings.json.
